description: Perform a Factorial ANOVA on the 'ToothGrowth' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv) using 'len' as the dependent variable and 'supp' and 'dose' as fixed factors. Ensure the 'dose' variable is treated as a categorical measure (Ordinal or Nominal) to correctly generate interaction means. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_Interaction.omv. Identify the estimated marginal mean for Supplement 'OJ' at Dose '2' and record only this numeric value in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/oj_dose2_mean.txt.
